summary: Iteration 46 - Program Card Closure Logic Redesign COMPLETE. Verified: (1) Flagship cards NEVER show closure overlays regardless of enrollment_open status - all 6 cards show full color with no dimming/grayscale. (2) Upcoming cards closure is now ONLY admin-controlled via enrollment_open toggle. (3) Admin panel shows orange-bordered dropdown with 4 closure text options when Enrollment Open is toggled OFF. (4) closure_text field persists correctly and displays on frontend.

success_rate.backend: 100% (API verification passed - closure_text field exists and persists)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily set Quad Layer Healing enrollment_open=false with closure_text='Sold Out' for testing, then restored to enrollment_open=true

Admin panel has orange-bordered closure_text dropdown with 4 options when enrollment is toggled OFF.

code_review_notes.ProgramsSection.jsx: Flagship cards - NO closure overlay logic implemented. The 'expired' variable exists (line 141-145) but is NOT used for any overlay/dimming. Card always renders with full color.
code_review_notes.UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx: Upcoming cards - Closure overlay at line 236-240 only shows when enrollment_open===false. Uses program.closure_text or falls back to 'Registration Closed'.
code_review_notes.AdminPanel.jsx: Orange-bordered closure dropdown at lines 376-384. Shows when !programForm.enrollment_open with 4 options.
